claims.name: Contrastive swing L23 bb
claims.statement: At layer 23 with $|c| = 5\%$, contrastive steering along the eot probe produces a 1.00-point preference swing on benign-benign pairs (n=50).

claims.name: Contrastive swing L23 hb
claims.statement: At layer 23 with $|c| = 5\%$, contrastive steering along the eot probe produces a 0.94-point preference swing on harmful-benign pairs (n=50).

claims.name: Contrastive swing L23 hh
claims.statement: At layer 23 with $|c| = 5\%$, contrastive steering along the eot probe produces a 0.93-point preference swing on harmful-harmful pairs (n=50).
